# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong Gateway Production Configuration File (kong.conf)

# Basic Server Configuration
prefix = /usr/local/kong/
log_level = notice
proxy_access_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/access.log
proxy_error_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/error.log
admin_access_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/admin_access.log
admin_error_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/admin_error.log

# Proxy Configuration - Client Traffic
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl http2
stream_listen = off
proxy_ssl_enabled = on

# Admin API Configuration - Restricted Access
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl
admin_ssl_enabled = on

# Database Configuration - PostgreSQL
database = postgres
pg_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_port = 5432
pg_timeout = 5000
pg_user = kong
pg_password = your_secure_password_here
pg_database = kong
pg_schema = public
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on

# Connection Pool Settings
pg_max_concurrent_queries = 0
pg_semaphore_timeout = 60000

# DNS Resolution
dns_resolver = 8.8.8.8:53,8.8.4.4:53
dns_hostsfile = /etc/hosts
dns_order = LAST,SRV,A,CNAME
dns_stale_ttl = 3600
dns_not_found_ttl = 30
dns_error_ttl = 1
dns_no_sync = off

# Nginx Configuration
nginx_user = kong kong
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = on
mem_cache_size = 128m
ssl_protocols = TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3
ssl_prefer_server_ciphers = on
ssl_session_tickets = on
ssl_session_timeout = 1d

# Performance Tuning
nginx_http_client_body_buffer_size = 8k
nginx_http_client_max_body_size = 10m
upstream_keepalive_pool_size = 60
upstream_keepalive_max_requests = 100
upstream_keepalive_idle_timeout = 60

# Security Settings
ssl_cipher_suite = intermediate
headers = server_tokens, latency_tokens
trusted_ips = 0.0.0.0/0,::/0
real_ip_header = X-Real-IP
real_ip_recursive = off

# Clustering and Cache
cluster_listen = 0.0.0.0:8005
cluster_control_plane = 127.0.0.1:8005
cluster_telemetry_listen = 0.0.0.0:8006
cluster_mtls = shared
cluster_max_payload = 4194304
db_update_frequency = 5
db_update_propagation = 0
db_cache_ttl = 0
db_cache_warmup_entities = services,plugins

# Plugins
plugins = bundled
pluginserver_names = 

# Miscellaneous
anonymous_reports = on
lua_package_path = ./?.lua;./?/init.lua;
lua_package_cpath = 
lua_socket_pool_size = 30

# Role-Based Deployment
role = traditional
kic = off

# Vitals and Analytics
vitals = on
vitals_strategy = prometheus
vitals_statsd_address = 127.0.0.1:8125
vitals_tsdb_address = 127.0.0.1:9090

# Declarative Configuration
declarative_config = 
declarative_config_string = 

# Status API
status_listen = 0.0.0.0:8100
status_access_log = off
status_error_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/status_error.log

# Client SSL
client_ssl = off
client_ssl_cert = 
client_ssl_cert_key = 

# Admin GUI (Enterprise)
admin_gui_listen = 127.0.0.1:8002, 127.0.0.1:8445 ssl
admin_gui_url = http://localhost:8002
admin_gui_ssl_enabled = on
admin_gui_access_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/admin_gui_access.log
admin_gui_error_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/admin_gui_error.log

# Portal Configuration (Enterprise)
portal = off
portal_gui_protocol = http
portal_gui_host = 127.0.0.1:8003
portal_api_listen = 0.0.0.0:8004, 0.0.0.0:8447 ssl
portal_gui_ssl_enabled = on

# RBAC (Enterprise)
enforce_rbac = off
admin_gui_auth = basic-auth
admin_gui_session_conf = {"secret":"super-secret-value","cookie_secure":true,"cookie_httponly":true}

# OpenTelemetry
opentelemetry_tracing = off
opentelemetry_tracing_sampling_rate = 0.01

# Router Flavor
router_flavor = traditional
